summary: Hard reload of https://tongyi.aliyun.com/qianwen did NOT trigger any v2.2.3 full-page warning intercept (tab title remained '千问-阿里 AI 助手', NOT '보안 정책 - 접근 차단'). Page loaded normally with chat input + 登录 (Login) button prominent — user is NOT authenticated. Pasted RRN prompt into chat input via clipboard, pressed Enter; input field cleared (placeholder '向千问提问' restored) but NO chat thread, NO message bubble, NO assistant response, and NO warning text containing '차단' rendered. Login button still visible after submit attempt — qianwen rejects unauth submissions silently (or with hidden modal). Cannot disambiguate between (a) APF S2 warning lost in regression vs (b) qianwen client never POSTed due to missing auth. Recommend re-running with logged-in qianwen session to clear AUTH confound. DevTools console showed 19 errors (mostly @ali/qianwen-web/2.7.2 chunk loads + fireyejs WAF, secdev sufei_data) but none referenced '차단' or APF block.
